good covenants to get early-on from interlude stages
deus ex machina (ch1): good to have to fill up slots where you're not sure what else you want to run on that character
twisted twins white (ch2): good for characters that have defend cards that are used often and also helps give a little bit more aliemus
burial grounds (ch4): used often on characters that have talents related to death resistance like horla or faint

covenants obtainable early-on from shops and exchanges
steppenwolf (golden rose): a generally good set for characters who have counter or poison
crimson pulse (badges): good for dps characters who rely on crits often but slightly less useful in star chapter
scarlet embrace (sediment): good for characters with multi-hit, mostly used in star chapter but can also be used in forgotten pages if you need extra s-key energy
cursed rabbit (pearls): good for characters who focus on healing or shielding like celeste
further evolution (pearls, level 45): usually the first choice for any character who relies on exalt like tulu
